# Achieved assurance when controlling efficiency risk

assurance_over <- 1 - pt(c_U, df = df, ncp = delta)
assurance_under <- pt(c_L, df = df, ncp = -delta)

cat("Achieved assurance for detecting overstatement:",
    round(assurance_over * 100, 1), "%\n")
\end{Verbatim}

    round(assurance_under * 100, 1), "%\n")
\end{Verbatim}
